title: New Yorker published a major investigation into Sam Altman and OpenAI today — based on never-before-disclosed internal memos and 100+ interviews
snippet:
Ronan Farrow spent 18 months on this OpenAI piece and it dropped today.

The sourcing is not normal

title: Neuralink enables nonverbal ALS patient to speak again with thoughts and AI-cloned voice
snippet:
a man with ALS can speak again using only his thoughts.

Neuralink's implant reads his brain signals
